Privacy Policy

Effective Date: February 2, 2026
Entity: Venom Industries LLC

Zero-Data Promise: SaaS Detective operates on a "Local-First" architecture. We do not maintain servers to store your browsing history, passwords, or personal data.

1. Data Collection & Usage

We comply with the Chrome Web Store User Data Policy, including the "Limited Use" requirements.

  • Personal Data: We do not collect names, addresses, or phone numbers. We collect your email address only if you voluntarily sign up for a free trial or paid subscription — this is used solely to deliver your license key and essential product communications.
  • Browsing Data: We do NOT track, log, or transmit your browsing history. The extension only scans the active tab when you click the extension to trigger a scan.
  • Technical Data: All technology detection (e.g., identifying "Shopify" or "React") happens locally on your device using bundled signatures.

2. Analytics & Usage Data

To improve the extension, we collect anonymous, non-personal usage data:

  • Installation Events: We track when the extension is installed or updated (no personally identifiable information).
  • Client ID: A random, non-identifiable token is generated locally to distinguish unique installations for analytics purposes. This cannot be used to identify you.
  • Scan Activity: To improve detection quality, we may record the domain name of sites you scan as anonymized aggregate data (e.g., "example.com"). This is never linked to your personal identity.
  • Data Controller: Analytics are sent to a Cloudflare Workers endpoint and PostHog (posthog.com) operated by or on behalf of Venom Industries LLC.

3. Permissions Justification

We use the minimum permissions necessary:

  • activeTab: Grants temporary access to the current page only after you click the extension.
  • storage: Saves your preferences and license status in Chrome storage (e.g., category filters, license key).
  • scripting: Injects the detection script into the active tab when you trigger a scan, including a read-only check of the page's JavaScript globals to detect tools loaded asynchronously.
  • host permissions (http/https): Allows the detector to read page markup on sites you choose to scan.
  • alarms: Used for periodic license revalidation (runs every 24 hours in the background).
  • notifications: Used to notify you when a Pro trial is about to expire or has ended.

4. European Union Users (GDPR)

Since we do not collect personal data (PII), we act as a local tool provider rather than a Data Processor. No user data is transferred to US servers by Venom Industries LLC.

5. Affiliate Disclosure

SaaS Detective's "Visit" buttons link to third-party tools and services. Some of these are affiliate links — if you click through and make a purchase, Venom Industries LLC may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

  • Affiliate links are marked with an aff badge inside the extension so you always know which links they are.
  • Our detection results are never influenced by affiliate relationships. A tool appears because it was found on the page — not because we have a commercial relationship with it.
  • Affiliate commissions help fund continued development of SaaS Detective and keep the free tier free.

If you have questions about specific affiliate relationships, email grayson@venom-industries.com.

© 2026 Venom Industries LLC. All Rights Reserved.
Terms of Service | Contact Support
